_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your local paths. config.json is gitignored. All paths are absolute. WSL paths use forward slashes; Windows paths use either / or \.
project_root: <set to local CYPForge repo root, e.g. E:/path/to/CYPForge>
benchmark_input_root: <set to absolute path of benchmark/ inside this repo, e.g. E:/path/to/CYPForge/benchmark>
run_root_base: <set to absolute path where benchmark runs should be written, e.g. C:/cypforge_agent_runs>
amber_sh: <set to WSL path of amber.sh, e.g. /home/<user>/amber25/amber.sh>
multiwfn_bin: <set to WSL path of Multiwfn_noGUI, e.g. /home/<user>/Multiwfn/Multiwfn_noGUI>

4EJJ.heme_state_evidence: HEM contains both Fe and an axial O1, indicating Fe=O compound I (CPDI).
4EJJ.pdb_preprocessing_note: PDB is a CYPForge-prepared intermediate (filename '4EJJ_CPD1_NCT.pdb'): the proximal Cys has already been renamed to CYM (anionic thiolate) and the heme distal O atoms have been built to encode compound I. Raw 4EJJ X-ray entries do not contain CYM/CPDI atoms.
4EJJ.expected_protonation_decision: GLU419 -> GLH419; HIE55 -> HID55; HIE299 -> HID299; HIE386 -> HID386; GLU275 remains GLU (watchlist); ASP237 and ASP335 remain ASP (watchlist); CYM410 remains CYM.
4EJJ.expected_protonation_residues: CYM410, HID55, HID299, HID386, GLH419, GLU275, ASP237, ASP335

1Z10.heme_state_evidence: HEM contains Fe but no axial oxo/dioxygen (only propionate Os O1A/O2A/O1D/O2D); resting Fe(III) low-spin = IC6.
1Z10.pdb_preprocessing_note: PDB is a CYPForge-prepared intermediate (filename '..._clean.pdb'): the proximal Cys at chain A resid 439 has already been renamed to CYP by CYPForge's standardize_proximal_cyp. Raw 1Z10 X-ray stores this residue as CYS A 439; a different residue (CYS A 82) sits ~21 A from Fe and is NOT axial. Fe-SG distance to CYP A 439 = 2.37 A (verified).
1Z10.expected_protonation_decision: Intake-driven; do not copy 4EJJ decisions. Derive HIE/HID, GLU/GLH, ASP/ASH choices from local 1Z10 chemistry before applying.

1Z11.heme_state_evidence: HEM contains Fe but no axial oxo/dioxygen (only propionate Os O1A/O2A/O1D/O2D); resting Fe(III) low-spin = IC6.
1Z11.pdb_preprocessing_note: PDB is a CYPForge-prepared intermediate (filename '..._clean_align.pdb'): the proximal Cys at chain A resid 439 has already been renamed to CYP by CYPForge's standardize_proximal_cyp. Raw 1Z11 X-ray stores this residue as CYS A 439; a different residue (CYS A 82) sits ~21 A from Fe and is NOT axial. Fe-SG distance to CYP A 439 = 2.37 A (verified).
1Z11.expected_protonation_decision: Intake-driven; do not copy 4EJJ decisions. Derive HIE/HID, GLU/GLH, ASP/ASH choices from local 1Z11 chemistry before applying.
